cta_section.heading: Ready to scale?
cta_section.subheading: Book a consultation with our AI experts today.

services.title: AI readiness assessment
services.subtitle: Technical & cultural audit
services.overview: Before you build, know where you stand. We evaluate your data infrastructure, talent, and processes to determine your readiness for AI adoption.

services.title: Strategic roadmap
services.subtitle: Phased implementation plans
services.overview: We build comprehensive, multi-year AI roadmaps that align with your business goals, ensuring every initiative drives tangible value.

services.title: Use case prioritization
services.subtitle: Impact vs effort matrix
services.overview: Not all AI ideas are equal. We help you identify and prioritize high-impact, low-effort use cases that demonstrate value quickly.

services.title: AI governance
services.subtitle: Ethics, safety & compliance
services.overview: Scale AI responsibly. We establish governance frameworks that ensure your AI systems are ethical, compliant, and secure.

site_footer.tagline: The intelligence layer for the modern enterprise. Engineering autonomy from the ground up.

note: Source content listed 'Use case prioritization' twice (duplicate block on the page); represented once here.
